title: What Will The UFO Files Reveal? 3 Possibilities
description: Donald Trump announced his administration would begin identifying and releasing UFO-related information earlier this year.

title: UFO Disclosure Latest Update: 46 Secret Clips of Alien Formations Allegedly Withheld from Lawmakers
description: US Rep. Anna Paulina Luna says the Pentagon missed a deadline to release 46 secret UFO videos, despite claims of authorization, fuelling demands over alleged 'Tic Tac' encounters near military assets.

title: Congresswoman Blasts Pentagon After UFO Videos Go Unreleased By Deadline: ‘How Convenient’
description: Congresswoman Anna Paulina Luna slammed the Pentagon for missing the April 14 deadline to release 46 specific UFO videos. Luna wrote a letter to the U.S. Secretary of War, Pete Hegseth, requesting the videos of UAPs (what the government now calls UFOs) on April 1. Luna is the chairwoman of the House Committee on Oversight [...] The post Congresswoman Blasts Pentagon After UFO Videos Go Unreleased By Deadline: ‘How Convenient’ appeared first on BroBible.

title: Trump Teases UFO File Dump as Tic Tac Sightings and Secret Pentagon Footage Fuels Frenzy
description: Donald Trump hints at releasing classified UFO files, reigniting public curiosity and speculation about what the government knows about extraterrestrial encounters.

title: Hong Kong Film Awards 2026 predictions: Ciao UFO, Back to the Past and more
description: This year’s Hong Kong Film Awards (HKFA) arrives under an unprecedented cloud of controversy, making Sunday’s 44th edition at the Hong Kong Cultural Centre one of the most heavily scrutinised ceremonies in the event’s history. The industry has been reeling ever since the pre-emptive disqualification of four eligible films in early January: Valley of the Shadow of Death, Vital Signs, Finch & Midland and Mother Bhumi. This opaque and as-yet-unexplained move by the HKFA effectively removed...
